历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 6374 → 7814 → 8771 → 7548 → 8281, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a brief rebound in 2024 followed by a further decline in 2025; the cumulative backward shift over the past 4 years is about 1900 places, with a baseline of approximately 8281 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Henan science (physics category) was 181 in 2021, 173 in 2022, 159 in 2023, 149 in 2024, and 185 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 253, an increase of 68 (+36.8%) compared to 2025, with a notable expansion rate, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 16th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the top 15–16 in recent years, belonging to a top-tier comprehensive university in China; the 2026 reputation evaluation is significantly negative, involving many incidents of teacher ethics and academic misconduct (46 negative out of 51), which may suppress candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 35th (relatively hot), with average attention; there were abnormal signals in the admission score line in 2022–2023, with some lagging effects; 19 disciplines including Stomatology A+, Clinical Medicine A, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Mathematics A, Pharmacy A+ have been rated A- or above, with strong disciplinary strength; flagship majors like Stomatology and Clinical Medicine have strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology continue to have high social popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan general college entrance examination is approximately 1.2 million (uncertain), a significant increase from the 2025 total of 555,000 physics category + 352,000 history category = 907,000, intensifying overall competition; Sichuan University is located in Sichuan Province (not Henan Province), with about 6.6% of its enrollment in Henan (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment; Henan candidates have a relatively high recognition of 985 universities in the Southwest region, with no significant negative regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion in 2026 (+36.8%) leading to intensified competition, the negative reputation of the university potentially suppressing application enthusiasm, and the increase in the total number of Henan candidates, the ranking is expected to continue to decline based on the 2025 baseline of 8281; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10308, with a range of 9808–10808.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 四川大学医学类在河南省2021年至2025年的最低录取位次分别为6374名、7490名、8771名、7548名、28989名。2021-2024年间位次在6374-8771区间波动，整体相对稳定。2025年 位次骤降至28989名，主要原因是当年新增了护理学（含双学士学位）专业（最低位次28989名），大幅拉低了医学类整体最低门槛。招生计划方面，2021年33人、2022年31人、20 23年26人、2024年19人（逐年缩减），2025年回升至33人。2026年招生计划大幅扩增至57人（较2025年增加24人，增幅约73%），扩招专业涵盖公共卫生与预防医学类（11人）、 药学类（10人）、护理学（8人）、基础医学拔尖计划（4人）、临床医学启德班（3人）等，招生规模显著扩大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，是西南地区综合实力最强的综合性大学之一。其华西医学中心在国内外享有极高声誉， 口腔医学、临床医学等学科长期位居全国前列，对河南考生具有极强的吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是河南考生的报考热门，尤其是四川大学华西医学中心的口腔医学、临床医学等王牌专业，竞争极为激烈。2026年医学类大幅扩招至57人，新增了公共卫生与预 防医学类、基础医学（拔尖计划）、临床医学（启德班）等多个专业方向，为不同分数段考生提供了更多选择。但整体医学报考热度持续高涨，位次仍将处于较高水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算结果及历年位次趋势，预测2026年四川大学医学类在河南省的最低录取位次约为41140名，位次区间为40640-41640名。2026年大幅扩招导致位次数字较2 025年进一步增大（更难进），但扩招幅度较大，位次下降趋势明显。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Sichuan University's medical programs in Henan Province from 2021 to 2025 were 6374, 7490, 8771, 7548, and 28989 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated within the 6374-8771 range, showing relative stability. In 2025, the ranking dropped sharply to 28989, mainly due to the addition of the Nursing (including dual bachelor's degree) program (minimum ranking 28989), which significantly lowered the overall minimum threshold for medical programs. In terms of enrollment plans, there were 33 students in 2021, 31 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 19 in 2024 (decreasing year by year), and rebounding to 33 in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan has significantly expanded to 57 students (an increase of 24 students compared to 2025, an increase of about 73%), with expanded majors covering Public Health and Preventive Medicine (11 students), Pharmacy (10 students), Nursing (8 students), Basic Medicine Top Talent Program (4 students), Clinical Medicine Qide Class (3 students), etc., indicating a notable expansion in enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities. It is one of the most comprehensive universities in Southwest China. Its West China Medical Center enjoys a high reputation both domestically and internationally, with disciplines such as Stomatology and Clinical Medicine consistently ranking among the top in the country, exerting a strong appeal to Henan candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs have always been a popular choice for Henan candidates, especially the flagship programs of Sichuan University's West China Medical Center, such as Stomatology and Clinical Medicine, which are highly competitive. In 2026, the medical programs have significantly expanded enrollment to 57 students, adding multiple new program directions such as Public Health and Preventive Medicine, Basic Medicine (Top Talent Program), and Clinical Medicine (Qide Class), providing more options for candidates at different score levels. However, the overall popularity of medical programs continues to rise, and rankings will remain at a relatively high level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculations and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Sichuan University's medical programs in Henan Province in 2026 is approximately 41140, with a ranking range of 40640-41640. The significant enrollment expansion in 2026 leads to a further increase in ranking numbers compared to 2025 (making it harder to enter), but due to the large expansion, the ranking decline trend is evident.
